<script>
(function() {
  try {
    var items = {{dlv - eventModel.items[]}} || [];
    if (!Array.isArray(items) || items.length === 0) return;

    var KEY_MAP = 'promo_item_map_v1';
    var KEY_PATTERN = 'promo_ids_pattern_v1';

    var loadMap = function() {
      try { return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem(KEY_MAP)) || {}; }
      catch(e) { return {}; }
    };

    var saveMap = function(map) {
      try { sessionStorage.setItem(KEY_MAP, JSON.stringify(map)); } catch(e) {}
    };

    var escapeRegex = function(s) {
      return String(s).replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
    };

    var rebuildPattern = function(map) {
      var ids = Object.keys(map);
      var pattern = ids.map(escapeRegex).join('|');
      try { sessionStorage.setItem(KEY_PATTERN, pattern); } catch(e) {}
      return pattern;
    };

    var map = loadMap();

    items.forEach(function(p) {
      if (!p || !p.item_id) return;

      var id = String(p.item_id);
      var promoId = p.promotion_id != null ? String(p.promotion_id) : '';
      var promoName = p.promotion_name != null ? String(p.promotion_name) : '';
      var discount = Number(p.discount) || 0;

      if (!map[id]) {
        map[id] = {
          promotion_id: promoId,
          promotion_name: promoName,
          discount: discount
        };
      } else {
        if (discount > (map[id].discount || 0)) {
          map[id].promotion_id = promoId;
          map[id].promotion_name = promoName;
          map[id].discount = discount;
        }
      }
    });
    saveMap(map);
    rebuildPattern(map);
    //console.log('[GTM] promo_item_map updated (max discount rule)', map);
  } catch(e) {
    console.warn('Błąd zapisu promo_item_map', e);
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function() {
  var items = {{dlv - eventModel.items[]}} || [];
  if (!Array.isArray(items) || items.length === 0) return;

  var currency = {{dlv - eventModel.currency}} || '';
  var value = {{dlv - eventModel.value}} || '';

  var KEY_MAP = 'promo_item_map_v1';
  var loadMap = function() {
    try { return JSON.parse(sessionStorage.getItem(KEY_MAP)) || {}; }
    catch(e) { return {}; }
  };
  var map = loadMap();
  if (!map || !Object.keys(map).length) return;

  // Tworzymy nową tablicę items z doklejonymi danymi promocji
  var enrichedItems = items.map(function(p) {
    var newItem = Object.assign({}, p);
    var id = String(p.item_id || '');
    if (map[id] && map[id].promotion_id) {
      newItem.promotion_id = map[id].promotion_id;
      newItem.promotion_name = map[id].promotion_name || undefined;
    }
    return newItem;
  });

  // Jeśli żaden produkt nie ma promotion_id, nie wysyłamy eventu
  var hasPromo = enrichedItems.some(function(p) { return !!p.promotion_id; });
  if (!hasPromo) return;

  window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
  window.dataLayer.push({
    event: 'promo_item_view_IdoMods',
    eventModel: {
      currency: currency,
      value: value,
      items: enrichedItems
    }
  });
  //console.log('[GTM] promo_item_view_IdoMods', enrichedItems);
})();
</script>
